settings.title: Website Use
settings.text: By accessing this website, you agree to use it lawfully and in accordance with these terms. Content, product availability, and pricing may change without prior notice.

settings.title: Product Information
settings.text: We strive for accurate descriptions of scented candles, custom candles, wax melts, and subscriptions. Minor variation in color, finish, and fragrance perception may occur due to handcrafted production.

settings.title: Orders & Payments
settings.text: Placing an order constitutes an offer to purchase. We reserve the right to cancel or limit orders at our discretion, including in cases of pricing errors, suspected fraud, or inventory limitations.

settings.title: Subscriptions
settings.text: Subscription purchases renew automatically according to the selected interval unless canceled before the next billing date. You may manage subscription settings through your account portal.

settings.title: Limitation of Liability
settings.text: Candles By Victoria is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of this site or products, to the extent permitted by law.

settings.title: Contact
settings.text: For questions about these terms, please contact our support team through the Contact page.

settings.caption: Policy Information
settings.heading: Terms of Service
settings.text: These terms govern your use of the Candles By Victoria website and purchases.
